title: Melancranis laevis
taxonomy:
Melancranis laevis is classified in the family Cercidiphyllaceae. 
This plant is native to East Asia and is also known as the katsura tree. 
It belongs to the order Cercidiphyllales and the class Magnoliopsida. 
Its classification is also represented by the kingdom Plantae. 
Melancranis laevis is further classified at the subfamily and genus levels as Cercidiphyllum subfamily and Cercidiphyllum genus respectively.
uses: Melancranis laevis, also known as the smooth blackthorn or smooth sloe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. There is limited information available on the medicinal uses of Melancranis laevis.
